response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; there is no evidence of SDL, IEC 62443, MQTT, or industrial protocols, and the resume misrepresents employment locations (all listed as Kenya despite German company affiliations), raising red flags about credibility and relevance.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility with multiple languages and frameworks
Active open-source contributor with documented tools and platforms
Demonstrated leadership in mentoring and technical workshops
concerns: No demonstrable C++ experience in enterprise or industrial contexts
Absence of IoT, message brokers, or industrial cybersecurity standards
Inconsistent and potentially misleading employment geography (Kenya vs. German employers)
